data.title: Cancer Drug Developer Nanobiotix Denies Any Active Takeover Process
data.description: Nanobiotix S.A. (NASDAQ: NBTX) saw an increase in shares following speculation about acquisition interest, as indicated by reports from media outlet La Lettre mentioning potential interest from Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ). However, the company clarified that there are no current takeover discussions or evaluations in progress, aiming to stabilize investor sentiment amid broader market gains. Nanobiotix issued a statement debunking factual inaccuracies in media reports and affirming its commitment to its biotechnological therapeutic innovations. The company emphasized its focus on existing strategies, denying any intentions for control changes. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Head of the International Energy Agency Fatih Birol says he is "ready to move forward" with an additional release of oil reserves "if and when necessary" amid the current global energy crisis triggered by the Iran conflict.

data.title: Visa joins Canton Network as Super Validator, enabling banks to facilitate stablecoin payments & settlement.
data.description: Visa is collaborating with banks to enable the processing of stablecoin transactions and settlements through blockchain technology. This initiative aims to maintain privacy on the institutional blockchain network by leveraging Visa's infrastructure. The partnership will facilitate seamless transactions and settlement processes, benefiting both financial institutions and consumers.

data.title: Atlanta Facial Plastic Surgeon Dr. Benjamin Stong Highlights Advanced Deep Plane Facelift Technique That Enhances Natural Cheekbone Definition
data.description: Dr. Benjamin Stong, a facial plastic surgeon in Atlanta, showcased a cutting-edge deep plane facelift method that enhances SMAS repositioning and accentuates cheekbones naturally by utilizing vertical midface elevation and providing structural facial support. The event took place in Atlanta on March 25, 2026, unveiling this innovative technique to the public.

data.title: Neon Sets Strong Financial Foundation for Future Growth
data.description: A technology company in New York, Neon, has recently disclosed receiving more than $25 million in funding from a combination of equity and credit sources, including Lightspeed Venture Partners, Upper90, and Upfront Ventures. This influx of capital raises Neon's total funding to close to $27 million, after a previous pre-seed round securing $1.5 million with Upfront Ventures, Wilson Sonsini, and Xfund as lead investors. Neon aims to empower individuals to monetize their personal data amidst growing concerns about data privacy and usage in the digital age.

data.title: AFFIRM FILMS AND MUCHO MAS MEDIA ANNOUNCE FEBRUARY 2027 THEATRICAL RELEASE OF THEIR LATEST FILM LIVE LIKE THAT
data.description: Set in Culver City, California, the inspiring true story of a young man's legacy serves as a beacon of hope in a divided community. Sony Pictures' AFFIRM Films and Mucho Mas Media reveal the release date for their upcoming film. Scheduled for release on March 25, 2026, this powerful narrative traces the impact of one individual in bridging a community torn apart by years of conflict.

data.title: For the tenth consecutive year, Grupo Bimbo is recognized by Ethisphere as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies
data.description: Celebrating its 80th anniversary, the company has achieved a remarkable feat by being among the select few globally to be honored with this recognition for ten years in a row. This achievement underscores its unwavering dedication to upholding standards of integrity, ethics, compliance, and governance.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Model Homes for Sale at Vista Rose in Placentia, California
data.description: Last chance to buy a new home in a prestigious community located in northern Orange County. The development features state-of-the-art home designs and is situated in a highly sought-after area.
PayPoint plc reports director/PDMR shareholding - key info undisclosed.

data.title: Onconetix Highlights Realbotix’s Role in Ericsson’s World-First 6G Trial Demonstration
data.description: A humanoid robot by Realbotix becomes Ericsson's initial client in enterprise robotics, joining a live 6G trial at Ericsson's U.S. headquarters. This robot is featured as a connected endpoint in the trial, which is conducted before the standard is officially established. Additionally, Onconetix has finalized a deal to acquire Realbotix, marking significant developments in the robotics industry.

data.title: SPIE signs an agreement for the acquisition of SGS Industrial Services, expanding industrial services in Germany
data.description: Cergy, 25th of March, 2026 - SPIE, a prominent European organization offering multi-technical services in energy and communications, has disclosed a recent agreement to acquire SGS Industrial Services Group. This acquisition marks SPIE's commitment to enhancing its industrial services in Germany and diversifying its value chain. This strategic move solidifies SPIE's position as a leading player in the industry.

data.title: Shareholders annual general meeting of April 30, 2026 - Conditions and availability of the meeting documents
data.description: The shareholders' annual general meeting is scheduled for April 30, 2026. The meeting documents will be made available to shareholders.

Sanoma Corporation buys back its shares on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Ilkka Oyj: Acquisition of own shares on 25 March 2026
data.description: Ilkka Oyj announced on 25th March 2026 at 07:00 p.m. EET that they have acquired a number of their own shares from the stock exchange.

data.title: CROSSJECT appoints Lionel Seltz as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Dijon, France on March 25, 2026 at 6:00 PM CET, CROSSJECT disclosed the appointment of Lionel Seltz as Chief Financial Officer. The company, traded on Euronext under the ticker symbol ALCJ with ISIN FR0011716265, specializes in developing emergency medicines utilizing its ZENEO® needle-free auto-injector platform. Notably, CROSSJECT's product ZEPIZURE® is designed for the emergency management of epileptic seizures.
